identity.name: E1
identity.archetype: ARCHETYPE 2: THE PERFORMANCE PRO (Adapted for Light Theme)
identity.mission: Create a hyper-clean, accessible, and efficient management tool for non-technical gym owners.

primary.name: Active Blue
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key highlights

rules: NO gradients for backgrounds. Solid, clean colors only.
Use subtle borders (border-slate-200) instead of heavy shadows.
Status badges must use pastel backgrounds with dark text (e.g., bg-green-100 text-green-800).
Body text must be Slate-600 or Slate-700 for optimal readability.
Dashboard cards must have p-6 padding.
Forms must have generous spacing between fields (gap-5).

structure: Top Row: 3-4 Key Metric Cards (Total Active, Monthly Revenue, Expiring Soon).
Main Section: Split 2/3 (Growth Chart) and 1/3 (Recent Activity / Quick Actions).
Bottom Section: Table of Members expiring this week.

cards.metric: p-6 flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200

tables.style: Simple, clean rows with hover state (hover:bg-slate-50). Header text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500.
tables.actions: Right-aligned action menu (Edit, Delete, Register Payment).

forms.style: Labels above inputs. Inputs with subtle border (border-slate-300) and focus ring (ring-blue-100).

images.description: Bright, modern yoga studio/gym interior. Use for Login/Register split screen background.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5 or 2px. Color: Slate-500 (inactive) / Blue-600 (active).

universal_guidelines: NO dark mode for this MVP (keep it simple for now).
Currency: Use generic '$' or local currency format, but keep it consistent.
Input validation is critical - Gym owners hate bad data.
Data-testids are MANDATORY for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup the Layout with a Sidebar and Topbar structure.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create the 'Dashboard' view with 4 metric cards and a 'Recent Payments' list.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Implement the 'Socios' (Members) CRUD page. Must include status badges (Active/Expired).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the 'Pagos' (Payments) page with manual entry form.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Ensure the Login page uses the provided image and looks professional.
